props.name: action
props.description: Custom action event name to dispatch when the link is clicked.

props.name: actionArg
props.description: Single argument to pass with the action event. Deprecated, use actionArgs instead.

props.name: actionArgs
props.description: Object of arguments to pass with the action event.

props.name: color
props.description: Sets the color theme. 'interactive' for blue, 'dark' for black, 'light' for white text.

props.name: leadingIcon
props.description: Icon displayed before the link text.

props.name: size
props.description: Sets the text size and corresponding icon size.

props.name: testId
props.description: Sets a data-testid attribute for automated testing.

props.name: trailingIcon
props.description: Icon displayed after the link text.
